relationship: duplicate confirmation of frankenjax-a7sf0 lower-packed Cholesky workspace rejection

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1227854 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf43-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

candidate.lever: private lower-packed workspace for blocked real Cholesky
candidate.description: Same lever family as canonical pass173/a7sf0: store the private Cholesky work matrix in packed lower-triangular rows, perform diagonal factorization, panel solve, and lower-triangle Schur update through packed indexing, then materialize public row-major L.

proof_test.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf43-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 13 focused Cholesky tests passed in candidate state, including packed-lower Schur update comparison against the previous row-major lower update and full-GEMM lower-triangle reference.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1167313 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1167313 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf43-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved diagonal block order, panel row order, lower-triangle p/q traversal, c=0..jb contribution order for each consumed lower-triangle Schur entry, and public row-major lower-triangular L materialization with strict upper zeros.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no comparison tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate changed private addressing/storage only. It introduced no mixed precision, FMA, reduction-tree change, tolerance contract, or public NaN/signed-zero policy change for consumed lower-triangle entries.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype/shape/error surface changed in candidate state.

validation.result: exit 1 with known file-wide linalg.rs inventory; embedded fmt, clippy, cargo check, and test-build sections were clean; no unsafe blocks detected

decision_notes: The p1vbf.43 candidate independently confirms the canonical a7sf0 rejection on the requested baseline worker.
Source was restored and no linalg.rs source diff is retained.
Do not repeat the private lower-packed Cholesky workspace family.

next_primitive.target: reprofile restored source and attack a different structural primitive
next_primitive.reason: The same lower-packed workspace lever failed on two same-worker gates. Next work should move to communication-avoiding/recursive Cholesky panel scheduling with an explicit bit-order proof, blocked LU/QR if reprofile ranks them higher, or a behavior-contract bead where a deeper FP-reordered algorithm is required.
